response.justification: While Bogdan possesses strong software craftsmanship, extensive full-stack experience, and demonstrated mentoring abilities, he falls significantly short of the core technical requirements for this role. Specifically, the position requires 8 years of C++ programming and deep experience with foundational cloud compute platform infrastructure, whereas his background is predominantly in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and higher-level web applications with less than a year of professional C++ experience.
strengths: Strong advocacy for software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD best practices.
Demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring through workshops, courses, and coding dojos.
Extensive experience designing, testing, and launching software products across various domains.
concerns: Severe lack of required C++ experience (less than 1 year compared to the 8 years required).
Infrastructure experience leans towards application development rather than low-level cloud compute platforms.
Missing deep production-level cloud architecture experience focusing on foundational compute, storage, or hardware at scale.
